title: Bind release provenance to immutable source commit

sources.reason: Current release workflow selects an exact source SHA but does not generate or publish source-bound evidence assets.
Canonical SBOM, provenance, and digest evidence producer.
Review finding requiring immutable SOURCE_COMMIT-bound release evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Release evidence must be generated from the immutable source commit selected by the workflow and must not self-attest a later or unrelated commit.

executionDecision.reason: The workflow can generate and verify source-bound evidence without publishing a release in this Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Reviewers must confirm that repository baselines are labeled as candidates and that final release evidence is generated from SOURCE_COMMIT in the workflow.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record checkpoints before editing the release workflow and before finishing.

acceptance: The release workflow generates SBOM, provenance, and digest artifacts after checking out SOURCE_COMMIT and fails unless provenance.commitSha equals SOURCE_COMMIT.
The workflow verifies the generated artifact subject digests and publishes the evidence files as GitHub Release assets without treating committed repository baselines as final release proof.
The evidence producer exposes a tested output-directory path that preserves the existing local baseline checks and explicit source-commit behavior.
Workflow tests and distribution documentation describe the immutable source-commit evidence boundary and the unreliability of the historical v0.5.27 provenance.
guidelines: Generated evidence is produced by the canonical supply-chain script, not hand-edited.
Release publication is not performed during this Work Item.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: workflow checks out the requested immutable source commit
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify with workflow assertions and regression tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: a source commit that differs from the workflow SHA is rejected
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify with release workflow content tests.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: generated provenance and digest manifest use the same source commit and subject digests
committed historical baseline is not treated as final release proof
scenarioCoverage.reason: Verify with workflow and distribution documentation tests.

intent.problem: The historical v0.5.27 provenance identifies the release-preparation base rather than an independently generated proof for the immutable released source commit.
constraints: Do not publish a new version in this Work Item.
Keep committed SBOM/provenance files as local candidate baselines only.
Use the existing standard-library evidence producer and exact-SHA workflow boundary.
intent.rationale: Release trust requires a single immutable SOURCE_COMMIT identity that is checked out, used to generate evidence, verified against all artifact digests, and published with the release.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly instructed: complete the current Work Item before opening the separate lifecycle-enforcement Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
